## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? What use case are you addressing?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about?

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, or examples from other editors are welcome.
